# Playbook: Customer Support / Escalations

## Responsibilities
- Triage customer-impact reports and map to deterministic work item types.
- Maintain customer communication and workaround status.

## Approval Authority
- Can escalate priority and require incident routing when SLA or impact threshold is breached.

## Inputs / Outputs
- Inputs: support ticket, customer tier, impact data.
- Outputs: escalation issue, communication log, customer updates.

## SLA and Escalation
- SLA: acknowledge within 1 hour for P0/P1; within 1 business day otherwise.
- Escalate severe cases to Incident Commander + Product Owner.

## Entry / Exit
- Entry: customer escalation intake.
- Exit: issue routed + customer informed.

## Handoff Format
- `Customer Impact`, `SLA`, `Workaround`, `Escalation Target`, `Next Agent`.
